__fixture_tag__: VENDORED SOURCE SNAPSHOT — frozen citation, not live data

claim.property: Inconel 718 stress-rupture / creep at 650 C, 100 h
claim.condition: 650 C, 100 h time-to-rupture (close to > 1000 h to 0.2 % creep strain in the engineering envelope)

source.primary: ASM Handbook vol. 1 — Properties and Selection: Irons, Steels, and High-Performance Alloys (1990)
source.citation: ASM Handbook vol. 1 + Special Metals Inconel 718 datasheet — IN718 stress-rupture > 690 MPa at 650 C, 100 h

tolerance.basis: spec must be >= 690 MPa per ASM / Special Metals envelope at 650 C, 100 h
